PropertyMetaDataIsDynamicFk Property

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns a value indicating whether values can be interpreted as dynamic foreign keys in the DbObjectKey format.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public bool IsDynamicFk { get; set; }

Property Value

Type: Boolean

Implements

IServerPropertyIsDynamicFk
Remarks
If this property is true, the property ValidReferencedTables may provide information about referenceable tables.
